---
title: "06b_model_late_integration"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and processed data
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(ranger)
library(pROC)

model_data_expression_only <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "model_data_expression_only.rds"))
model_data_methylation_only <- read_rds(here("data", "processed", "model_data_methylation_only.rds"))

dir.create(here("outputs"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Keep common patients only
#--------------------------------------------------

common_cases <- intersect(
  model_data_expression_only$case_submitter_id,
  model_data_methylation_only$case_submitter_id
)

expr_common <- model_data_expression_only %>%
  filter(case_submitter_id %in% common_cases) %>%
  arrange(case_submitter_id)

meth_common <- model_data_methylation_only %>%
  filter(case_submitter_id %in% common_cases) %>%
  arrange(case_submitter_id)

stopifnot(all(expr_common$case_submitter_id == meth_common$case_submitter_id))
stopifnot(all(expr_common$survival_500 == meth_common$survival_500))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Split predictors and outcome
#--------------------------------------------------

expr_feature_cols <- names(expr_common)[str_detect(names(expr_common), "^ENSG")]
meth_feature_cols <- names(meth_common)[str_detect(names(meth_common), "^cg")]

x_expr <- expr_common %>%
  select(all_of(expr_feature_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

x_meth <- meth_common %>%
  select(all_of(meth_feature_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

y <- factor(expr_common$survival_500, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
case_ids <- expr_common$case_submitter_id
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Create shared CV folds
#--------------------------------------------------

set.seed(123)

folds <- createMultiFolds(y, k = 5, times = 5)

# storage for out-of-fold predictions
oof_predictions <- tibble()
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Loop through shared folds
#--------------------------------------------------

for (fold_name in names(folds)) {
  
  train_idx <- folds[[fold_name]]
  test_idx <- setdiff(seq_along(y), unique(train_idx))
  
  x_expr_train <- x_expr[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  x_expr_test  <- x_expr[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  
  x_meth_train <- x_meth[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  x_meth_test  <- x_meth[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  
  y_train <- y[train_idx]
  y_test  <- y[test_idx]
  
  # expression RF using best expression tuning
  model_expr_rf <- ranger(
    dependent.variable.name = "survival_500",
    data = bind_cols(survival_500 = y_train, x_expr_train),
    probability = TRUE,
    num.trees = 500,
    mtry = 150,
    min.node.size = 5,
    splitrule = "gini",
    importance = "impurity",
    seed = 123
  )
  
  expr_prob <- predict(model_expr_rf, data = x_expr_test)$predictions[, "Yes"]
  
  # methylation RF using best methylation tuning
  model_meth_rf <- ranger(
    dependent.variable.name = "survival_500",
    data = bind_cols(survival_500 = y_train, x_meth_train),
    probability = TRUE,
    num.trees = 500,
    mtry = 50,
    min.node.size = 10,
    splitrule = "gini",
    importance = "impurity",
    seed = 123
  )
  
  meth_prob <- predict(model_meth_rf, data = x_meth_test)$predictions[, "Yes"]
  
  ensemble_prob <- (expr_prob + meth_prob) / 2
  
  fold_results <- tibble(
    Resample = fold_name,
    rowIndex = test_idx,
    case_submitter_id = case_ids[test_idx],
    obs = y_test,
    expr_prob = expr_prob,
    meth_prob = meth_prob,
    ensemble_prob = ensemble_prob
  )
  
  oof_predictions <- bind_rows(oof_predictions, fold_results)
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Evaluate late integration ensemble
#--------------------------------------------------

late_integration_auc <- roc(
  response = oof_predictions$obs,
  predictor = oof_predictions$ensemble_prob,
  levels = c("No", "Yes"),
  direction = "<"
)$auc

late_integration_summary <- tibble(
  model = "LateIntegration_RF_Average",
  auc = as.numeric(late_integration_auc)
)

print(late_integration_summary)

write_csv(
  oof_predictions,
  here("outputs", "tables", "late_integration_oof_predictions.csv")
)

write_csv(
  late_integration_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "late_integration_auc_summary.csv")
)
```
